fields.name: showOnHomePage
fields.label: Show on Home Page
fields.description: Enable to display this service on the home page services section

fields.name: homePageDescription
fields.label: Home Page Description
fields.description: Short description for home page card (required if Show on Home Page is enabled)

fields.name: homePageIcon
fields.label: Home Page Icon
fields.description: Icon for home page card (required if Show on Home Page is enabled)

fields.name: featuredImage
fields.label: Featured Image
fields.description: Main hero/showcase image for the project

fields.name: shortDescription
fields.label: Short Description
fields.description: Brief description shown in blog cards (recommended: 100-150 characters)

fields.name: author
fields.label: Author
fields.description: Optional author name for the blog post

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
